decks.notes: The main concept of this Legacy 1 vs 1 Combo - Show and Tell deck is to quickly get out powerful creatures, such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn, by using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. This deck focuses on fast mana generation with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to cast big threats early in the game. The deck also includes counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect your combo pieces. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures and win the game quickly.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. Utilizing cards like Hymn to Tourach, Thoughtseize, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to disrupt the opponent's hand, while also using cards like Mishra's Bauble, Brazen Borrower, and Moonshadow to control the board and keep the pressure on. The deck aims to maintain tempo by playing disruptive spells like Daze and Fatal Push to keep the opponent on the back foot, while also utilizing powerful cards like Sheoldred's Edict to close out the game.

The deck focuses on quickly controlling the game through disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a fast pace to close out the game before the opponent can recover. Utilizing cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to dig for key pieces, this deck looks to aggressively disrupt the opponent's strategy and establish a dominant board presence to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to use aggressive Eldrazi creatures to quickly overwhelm your opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Wasteland. By utilizing fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb, combined with powerful creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher, the deck aims to present a fast clock that can be difficult for opponents to deal with. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Glaring Fleshraker and It That Heralds the End provide additional disruption and threats to further pressure the opponent.

The main concept of the deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Murktide Regent, and Delver of Secrets, while using disruptive spells like Force of Will, Daze, and Pyroblast to protect your threats and disrupt your opponent's game plan. The mana base consists of lands that allow for consistency and flexibility, while also providing the ability to shut down opposing nonbasic lands with Wasteland. The deck aims to quickly apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's strategy to secure the win.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan using a combination of hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize, counter spells like Force of Will, and removal spells like Fatal Push. The deck also aims to tempo out opponents by playing efficiently costed threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, while also generating card advantage through spells like Ponder and Brainstorm. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Wasteland to disrupt opponent's mana base and Orcish Bowmasters to apply additional pressure. Overall, the deck aims to control the game while also presenting a fast clock to defeat opponents quickly.

The main focus of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher ahead of schedule. With cards like Chalice of the Void and Wasteland disrupting opponents' strategies, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The inclusion of cards like Kozilek's Command and Glaring Fleshraker add versatility and removal options to further solidify this deck's aggressive approach in Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by using lands to disrupt your opponent's resources and establish board dominance. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration to generate value from lands, while also using cards like Mox Diamond and Crop Rotation to accelerate your game plan. By combining land control with powerful win conditions like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a steady stream of threats and disruption, ultimately securing victory through superior resource management.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while efficiently deploying threats to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. It focuses on using disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Hymn to Tourach to disrupt the opponent's hand, while using efficient removal like Fatal Push and countermagic like Force of Will to control the board. The deck also includes threats like Orcish Bowmasters, Murktide Regent, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to pressure the opponent and quickly close out the game before they can stabilize.

The main focus of the deck is to have early aggression with creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler, supported by counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to protect them. The deck also utilizes tempo plays with cards like Wasteland and cheap removal spells such as Lightning Bolt. Additionally, the deck includes some powerful finishers like Murktide Regent to close out games quickly. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan while also providing the necessary colors for the spells in the deck.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy with a combination of efficient counterspells, hand disruption, and removal spells. The deck aims to tempo its way to victory by deploying threats like Orcish Bowmasters, Murktide Regent, Nethergoyf, and Kaito, while maintaining card advantage with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck also includes a land destruction package with Wasteland to further disrupt the opponent's mana base. This Dimir Tempo deck excels at disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure on multiple fronts.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence and tempo advantage through a combination of cheap spells and disruptive effects. By utilizing cards like Brainstorm, Lightning Bolt, and Daze, the deck aims to control the game early on while deploying threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Murktide Regent, and Cori-Steel Cutter to apply pressure and close out the game. The deck also makes use of efficient mana fixing with fetchlands like Scalding Tarn and Misty Rainforest to ensure consistency in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to be proactive and aggressive in disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining a strong board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to use the card Show and Tell to put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play for a minimal cost. By using cards like Sneak Attack and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to quickly and efficiently put out game-winning threats while utilizing counterspells and card draw to protect its game plan. A combination of fast mana sources and disruptive elements like Force of Will and Spell Pierce help ensure the success of the combo strategy, making it a formidable force in Legacy 1 vs 1 gameplay.

This deck focuses on using lands to control the game and disrupt your opponent's strategies. By utilizing cards like Wasteland, Urza's Saga, and Thespian's Stage, you can disrupt your opponent's mana base and strategies while also ramping up your own resources. Life from the Loam helps you recycle your lands and keep your engine running smoothly. Dark Depths and Crop Rotation provide a win condition by creating a powerful 20/20 creature. Overall, this deck aims to control the game through strategic land plays and disruption spells.

The main concept of this Legacy Control - Stiflenought deck is to use a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw to control the board while attempting to cheat out a win condition in the form of Phyrexian Dreadnought. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Stifle and Force of Will, while also utilizing cards like Ponder and Brainstorm to find its key pieces efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Dress Down and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides additional utility and card advantage, making the deck versatile in various matchups.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and tempo through a combination of counterspells, discards, and removal spells. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition, typically by cheating out a powerful creature like Phyrexian Dreadnought with cards like Reanimate. Tamiyo and Mishra's Bauble provide card advantage and selection, while cards like Stifle and Dress Down can disrupt the opponent's strategies. The deck also has a strong mana denial plan with Wasteland and the ability to grind out the opponent with cards like Abhorrent Oculus.
